service.name: DemoFX
service.description: Get currency exchange rates. Supports 10 major currencies.

capabilities.description: Get exchange rate between two currencies

params.to: string, required — target currency code (same options)
params.amount: number, optional, default 1 — amount to convert

capabilities.returns: from, to, rate, amount, converted_amount, last_updated

capabilities.description: List all supported currency codes and names
Get all rates relative to a base currency
